categories.name: Woolen Fashion
categories.description: Stay cozy and stylish with our handcrafted woolen apparel.

categories.name: Creative Keychains
categories.description: Unique and adorable keychains to personalize your style.

categories.name: Handmade Decor
categories.description: Bring warmth to your home with our knitted decorations.

products.name: Soulful Tote
products.description: A spacious and stylish tote bag, handcrafted with premium wool. This tote is perfect for daily use, combining durability with an artistic handcrafted aesthetic.
products.details: 100% Cotton Wool, Hand-knitted, Durable inner lining, Size: 14x16 inches.

products.name: Knitted Charm
products.description: A cute knitted charm to add character to your keys or bag. Each charm is uniquely crafted with attention to every small detail.
products.details: Premium Yarn, Stainless steel ring, Eco-friendly filling.

products.name: Woolen Heart
products.description: A soft, knitted heart perfect for home decoration or gifting. It brings a touch of warmth and love to any corner of your room.
products.details: Soft Wool, Washable, Safe for kids, Size: 5x5 inches.

products.name: Crafty Pouch
products.description: A versatile pouch for your essentials, featuring intricate patterns. Ideal for carrying makeup, stationery, or your phone.
products.details: Zip closure, Hand-knitted pattern, Lightweight, Dimensions: 8x5 inches.

products.name: Soft Mascot
products.description: A tiny knitted mascot that brings a smile wherever it goes. It's the perfect companion for your backpack or a sweet desk buddy.

products.name: Artist Scarf
products.description: An elegant, hand-knitted scarf designed for comfort and style. The artist's touch is visible in the unique loop patterns.
products.details: Merino Wool Blend, Winter-ready, Extra long (6 feet), Hand wash only.

products.name: Cozy Mittens
products.description: Warm and soft mittens to keep your hands cozy during winter. Features a stretchable wrist band for a snug fit.
products.details: Double layered wool, Breathable material, Available in multiple colors.

products.name: Cloud Plush
products.description: A large, fluffy cloud plushie that adds a touch of magic to any room. It feels like hugging a real cloud!
products.details: Super soft synthetic wool, Large size (18 inches), Dust resistant.

products.name: Boho Wall Hanging
products.description: Incredibly detailed wall hanging for a bohemian interior vibe. Handcrafted with multiple yarn textures.
products.details: Macramé & Knit hybrid, Natural wood rod, Length: 24 inches.

products.name: Mini Cactus Pot
products.description: A knitted mini cactus that never needs watering! Comes in a cute little ceramic-look knitted pot.
products.details: Miniature size (4 inches), Perfect for desk, Includes knitted soil detail.
